question.en: How many Surahs are there in the Quran?
question.tr: Kuran-ı Kerim'de kaç sure vardır?
question.id: Berapa jumlah surah dalam Al-Quran?
question.ms: Berapakah jumlah surah dalam Al-Quran?

explanation.en: The Quran contains 114 Surahs, beginning with Al-Fatiha and ending with An-Nas. They are divided into Meccan and Medinan based on where they were revealed.
explanation.tr: Kuran-ı Kerim 114 sureden oluşur. Fatiha Suresi ile başlar, Nas Suresi ile biter. Sureler indirildikleri yere göre Mekki ve Medeni olarak ikiye ayrılır.
explanation.id: Al-Quran terdiri dari 114 surah, dimulai dari Al-Fatihah dan diakhiri dengan An-Nas. Surah-surah ini terbagi menjadi Makkiyah dan Madaniyah berdasarkan tempat turunnya.
explanation.ms: Al-Quran mengandungi 114 surah, bermula dengan Al-Fatihah dan berakhir dengan An-Nas. Surah-surah ini terbahagi kepada Makkiyah dan Madaniyah berdasarkan tempat penurunannya.

question.en: How many daily obligatory prayers are there in Islam?
question.tr: İslam'da günde kaç vakit farz namaz vardır?
question.id: Berapa jumlah salat wajib harian dalam Islam?
question.ms: Berapakah jumlah solat fardu harian dalam Islam?

explanation.en: Muslims perform five daily prayers: Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, and Isha. They were made obligatory during the Night Journey (Isra and Mi'raj).
explanation.tr: Müslümanlar günde beş vakit namaz kılar: Sabah, Öğle, İkindi, Akşam ve Yatsı. Bu namazlar İsra ve Miraç hadisesinde farz kılınmıştır.
explanation.id: Umat Islam menunaikan lima salat harian: Subuh, Zuhur, Asar, Maghrib, dan Isya. Salat ini diwajibkan saat peristiwa Isra Mi'raj.
explanation.ms: Umat Islam menunaikan lima solat harian: Subuh, Zohor, Asar, Maghrib, dan Isyak. Solat ini diwajibkan semasa peristiwa Israk dan Mikraj.

question.en: In which city was Prophet Muhammad (SAW) born?
question.tr: Peygamber Efendimiz (SAV) hangi şehirde doğmuştur?
question.id: Di kota mana Nabi Muhammad (SAW) dilahirkan?
question.ms: Di bandar mana Nabi Muhammad (SAW) dilahirkan?

explanation.en: The Prophet (SAW) was born in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant (around 570 CE), the same year Abraha's army attempted to destroy the Ka'bah.
explanation.tr: Peygamber Efendimiz (SAV) Mekke'de, Fil Yılı'nda (yaklaşık 570) doğmuştur. Bu yıl, Ebrehe'nin Kabe'yi yıkmaya geldiği yıldır.
explanation.id: Nabi (SAW) lahir di Mekah pada Tahun Gajah (sekitar 570 M), tahun yang sama ketika pasukan Abrahah mencoba menghancurkan Ka'bah.
explanation.ms: Nabi (SAW) dilahirkan di Mekah pada Tahun Gajah (sekitar 570 M), tahun yang sama apabila tentera Abrahah cuba memusnahkan Kaabah.

question.en: Who is the first Prophet in Islam?
question.tr: İslam'daki ilk peygamber kimdir?
question.id: Siapakah nabi pertama dalam Islam?
question.ms: Siapakah nabi pertama dalam Islam?

explanation.en: Adam (A.S.) was the first human and the first Prophet. Allah created him from clay and taught him the names of all things, as mentioned in Surah Al-Baqarah.
explanation.tr: Hz. Adem (A.S.) ilk insan ve ilk peygamberdir. Allah onu topraktan yaratmış ve Bakara Suresi'nde belirtildiği gibi ona her şeyin isimlerini öğretmiştir.
explanation.id: Nabi Adam (A.S.) adalah manusia pertama dan nabi pertama. Allah menciptakannya dari tanah dan mengajarkan nama segala sesuatu, seperti disebutkan dalam Surah Al-Baqarah.
explanation.ms: Nabi Adam (A.S.) adalah manusia pertama dan nabi pertama. Allah menciptakannya daripada tanah dan mengajarkan nama segala sesuatu, sebagaimana disebut dalam Surah Al-Baqarah.

question.en: How many pillars of Islam are there?
question.tr: İslam'ın şartı kaçtır?
question.id: Berapa jumlah rukun Islam?
question.ms: Berapakah jumlah rukun Islam?

explanation.en: The five pillars are: Shahada (testimony of faith), Salah (prayer), Zakat (almsgiving), Sawm (fasting Ramadan), and Hajj (pilgrimage) for those able.
explanation.tr: İslam'ın beş şartı: Kelime-i Şehadet, Namaz, Zekat, Ramazan Orucu ve gücü yetenler için Hac'dır.
explanation.id: Lima rukun Islam adalah: Syahadat, Salat, Zakat, Puasa Ramadan, dan Haji bagi yang mampu.
explanation.ms: Lima rukun Islam ialah: Syahadah, Solat, Zakat, Puasa Ramadan, dan Haji bagi yang berkemampuan.

question.en: What is the longest Surah in the Quran?
question.tr: Kuran-ı Kerim'deki en uzun sure hangisidir?
question.id: Surah terpanjang dalam Al-Quran adalah?
question.ms: Apakah surah terpanjang dalam Al-Quran?

explanation.en: Surah Al-Baqarah has 286 verses, making it the longest in the Quran. It contains Ayat al-Kursi and the last two verses that offer great reward when recited at night.
explanation.tr: Bakara Suresi 286 ayetle Kuran'ın en uzun suresidir. İçinde Ayetel Kürsi ve gece okunduğunda büyük sevap vaat edilen son iki ayet bulunur.
explanation.id: Surah Al-Baqarah memiliki 286 ayat, menjadikannya yang terpanjang. Di dalamnya terdapat Ayat Kursi dan dua ayat terakhir yang berpahala besar jika dibaca di malam hari.
explanation.ms: Surah Al-Baqarah mempunyai 286 ayat, menjadikannya yang terpanjang. Di dalamnya terdapat Ayat Kursi dan dua ayat terakhir yang berpahala besar jika dibaca pada waktu malam.

question.en: Who was the first wife of Prophet Muhammad (SAW)?
question.tr: Peygamber Efendimiz'in (SAV) ilk eşi kimdir?
question.id: Siapakah istri pertama Nabi Muhammad (SAW)?
question.ms: Siapakah isteri pertama Nabi Muhammad (SAW)?

explanation.en: Khadijah (R.A.) was a successful merchant and the Prophet's first wife. She was the first person to accept Islam and supported him through the early years of revelation.
explanation.tr: Hz. Hatice (R.A.) başarılı bir tüccar ve Peygamber'in ilk eşidir. İslam'ı kabul eden ilk kişidir ve vahyin ilk yıllarında Peygamberimize büyük destek vermiştir.
explanation.id: Khadijah (R.A.) adalah seorang pedagang sukses dan istri pertama Nabi. Beliau adalah orang pertama yang memeluk Islam dan mendukung Nabi di tahun-tahun awal kenabian.
explanation.ms: Khadijah (R.A.) adalah seorang peniaga yang berjaya dan isteri pertama Nabi. Beliau adalah orang pertama yang memeluk Islam dan menyokong Nabi pada tahun-tahun awal kenabian.

question.en: How many rakats are in the Fajr obligatory prayer?
question.tr: Sabah namazının farzı kaç rekattır?
question.id: Berapa rakaat salat fardu Subuh?
question.ms: Berapa rakaat solat fardu Subuh?

explanation.en: Fajr consists of 2 rakats of fard, preceded by 2 rakats of sunnah. The Prophet (SAW) said the two sunnah rakats of Fajr are better than this world and all it contains.
explanation.tr: Sabah namazının farzı 2 rekattır, öncesinde 2 rekat sünnet vardır. Peygamberimiz (SAV) sabah namazının sünnetinin dünyadan ve içindekilerden daha hayırlı olduğunu buyurmuştur.
explanation.id: Salat Subuh terdiri dari 2 rakaat fardu, didahului 2 rakaat sunnah. Nabi (SAW) bersabda bahwa 2 rakaat sunnah Subuh lebih baik dari dunia dan seisinya.
explanation.ms: Solat Subuh terdiri daripada 2 rakaat fardu, didahului 2 rakaat sunat. Nabi (SAW) bersabda bahawa 2 rakaat sunat Subuh lebih baik daripada dunia dan seisinya.

question.en: Which Prophet was swallowed by a whale?
question.tr: Hangi peygamber balık tarafından yutulmuştur?
question.id: Nabi mana yang ditelan oleh ikan paus?
question.ms: Nabi mana yang ditelan oleh ikan paus?

explanation.en: Yunus (A.S.) left his people without Allah's permission and was swallowed by a whale. His supplication from within it ('La ilaha illa anta...') is praised in the Quran.
explanation.tr: Hz. Yunus (A.S.) kavmini Allah'ın izni olmadan terk etmiş ve balık tarafından yutulmuştur. Balığın karnındaki duası ('La ilahe illa ente...') Kuran'da övülmüştür.
explanation.id: Nabi Yunus (A.S.) meninggalkan kaumnya tanpa izin Allah dan ditelan ikan. Doanya dari dalam perut ikan ('La ilaha illa anta...') dipuji dalam Al-Quran.
explanation.ms: Nabi Yunus (A.S.) meninggalkan kaumnya tanpa izin Allah dan ditelan ikan. Doanya dari dalam perut ikan ('La ilaha illa anta...') dipuji dalam Al-Quran.

question.en: Who is the Angel of Revelation?
question.tr: Vahiy meleği kimdir?
question.id: Siapakah malaikat pembawa wahyu?
question.ms: Siapakah malaikat pembawa wahyu?

explanation.en: Jibril (A.S.) brought revelation to all Prophets, including the Quran to Muhammad (SAW). He is described in the Quran as 'trustworthy' and 'mighty in power'.
explanation.tr: Cebrail (A.S.) tüm peygamberlere vahiy getirmiştir. Kuran-ı Kerim'i Hz. Muhammed'e (SAV) indirmiştir. Kuran'da 'güvenilir' ve 'büyük güç sahibi' olarak tanımlanır.
explanation.id: Jibril (A.S.) membawa wahyu kepada semua nabi, termasuk Al-Quran kepada Nabi Muhammad (SAW). Ia disebut dalam Al-Quran sebagai 'yang terpercaya' dan 'sangat kuat'.
explanation.ms: Jibril (A.S.) membawa wahyu kepada semua nabi, termasuk Al-Quran kepada Nabi Muhammad (SAW). Beliau disebut dalam Al-Quran sebagai 'yang dipercayai' dan 'sangat berkuasa'.

question.en: Who was the first Caliph after the Prophet (SAW)?
question.tr: Peygamber Efendimiz'den (SAV) sonraki ilk halife kimdir?
question.id: Siapakah khalifah pertama setelah Nabi (SAW)?
question.ms: Siapakah khalifah pertama selepas Nabi (SAW)?

explanation.en: Abu Bakr (R.A.) was the closest companion of the Prophet (SAW) and led the Muslims after his passing. His caliphate lasted about two years and dealt with the Ridda wars.
explanation.tr: Hz. Ebubekir (R.A.) Peygamber'in en yakın arkadaşıdır ve vefatından sonra Müslümanlara liderlik etmiştir. Yaklaşık iki yıl süren halifeliği döneminde Ridde savaşlarıyla uğraştı.
explanation.id: Abu Bakar (R.A.) adalah sahabat terdekat Nabi dan memimpin kaum Muslimin setelah wafatnya Nabi. Kekhalifahannya berlangsung sekitar dua tahun dan menghadapi perang Riddah.
explanation.ms: Abu Bakar (R.A.) adalah sahabat terdekat Nabi dan memimpin umat Islam selepas kewafatan Baginda. Pemerintahannya berlangsung kira-kira dua tahun dan berhadapan dengan perang Riddah.

question.en: What is the shortest Surah in the Quran?
question.tr: Kuran-ı Kerim'deki en kısa sure hangisidir?
question.id: Surah terpendek dalam Al-Quran adalah?
question.ms: Apakah surah terpendek dalam Al-Quran?

explanation.en: Surah Al-Kawthar has only three verses. Despite its brevity, it mentions the great abundance (Al-Kawthar) given to the Prophet (SAW), including the river in Paradise.
explanation.tr: Kevser Suresi sadece üç ayetten oluşur. Kısalığına rağmen, Peygamber'e (SAV) verilen büyük hayırdan (Kevser) bahseder; cennetteki Kevser ırmağı da buna dahildir.
explanation.id: Surah Al-Kautsar hanya terdiri dari tiga ayat. Meski pendek, surah ini menyebutkan nikmat besar (Al-Kautsar) yang diberikan kepada Nabi (SAW), termasuk sungai di surga.
explanation.ms: Surah Al-Kautsar hanya mengandungi tiga ayat. Walaupun pendek, surah ini menyebut nikmat besar (Al-Kautsar) yang dikurniakan kepada Nabi (SAW), termasuk sungai di syurga.

question.en: At what age did Prophet Muhammad (SAW) receive his first revelation?
question.tr: Peygamber Efendimiz (SAV) ilk vahyi kaç yaşında aldı?
question.id: Pada usia berapa Nabi Muhammad (SAW) menerima wahyu pertama?
question.ms: Pada usia berapa Nabi Muhammad (SAW) menerima wahyu pertama?

explanation.en: The first revelation came in the Cave of Hira when the Prophet (SAW) was 40. Jibril (A.S.) brought the first verses of Surah Al-Alaq, beginning with 'Iqra' (Read).
explanation.tr: İlk vahiy Hira Mağarası'nda, Peygamber (SAV) 40 yaşındayken gelmiştir. Cebrail (A.S.) Alak Suresi'nin ilk ayetlerini getirmiştir; 'İkra' (Oku) emriyle başlar.
explanation.id: Wahyu pertama turun di Gua Hira saat Nabi (SAW) berusia 40 tahun. Jibril (A.S.) membawa ayat-ayat pertama Surah Al-Alaq, diawali dengan 'Iqra' (Bacalah).
explanation.ms: Wahyu pertama turun di Gua Hira ketika Nabi (SAW) berusia 40 tahun. Jibril (A.S.) membawa ayat-ayat pertama Surah Al-Alaq, bermula dengan 'Iqra' (Bacalah).

question.en: In which month do Muslims fast?
question.tr: Müslümanlar hangi ayda oruç tutar?
question.id: Pada bulan apa umat Islam berpuasa?
question.ms: Pada bulan apa umat Islam berpuasa?

explanation.en: Ramadan is the 9th month of the Islamic calendar and the month in which the Quran was first revealed. Fasting it is the fourth pillar of Islam.
explanation.tr: Ramazan, hicri takvimin 9. ayıdır ve Kuran-ı Kerim'in indirilmeye başladığı aydır. Ramazan orucu İslam'ın dördüncü şartıdır.
explanation.id: Ramadan adalah bulan ke-9 dalam kalender Hijriah dan bulan saat Al-Quran pertama kali diturunkan. Berpuasa di bulan ini adalah rukun Islam keempat.
explanation.ms: Ramadan adalah bulan ke-9 dalam kalendar Hijrah dan bulan ketika Al-Quran mula diturunkan. Berpuasa pada bulan ini adalah rukun Islam keempat.

question.en: Which Prophet built the first Ka'bah with his son?
question.tr: Kabe'yi oğluyla birlikte inşa eden peygamber kimdir?
question.id: Nabi mana yang membangun Ka'bah bersama putranya?
question.ms: Nabi mana yang membina Kaabah bersama anaknya?

explanation.en: Ibrahim (A.S.) raised the foundations of the Ka'bah with his son Ismail (A.S.), as described in Surah Al-Baqarah, praying that Allah accept it from them.
explanation.tr: Hz. İbrahim (A.S.) oğlu Hz. İsmail (A.S.) ile Kabe'nin temellerini yükseltmiştir. Bakara Suresi'nde bu olay ve Allah'tan kabul etmesini istedikleri dua anlatılır.
explanation.id: Nabi Ibrahim (A.S.) meninggikan fondasi Ka'bah bersama putranya Nabi Ismail (A.S.), sebagaimana diceritakan dalam Surah Al-Baqarah, memohon agar Allah menerimanya.
explanation.ms: Nabi Ibrahim (A.S.) meninggikan asas Kaabah bersama anaknya Nabi Ismail (A.S.), sebagaimana diceritakan dalam Surah Al-Baqarah, memohon agar Allah menerimanya.

question.en: How many names of Allah (Asma ul-Husna) are commonly known?
question.tr: Esma-ül Hüsna kaç tanedir?
question.id: Berapa jumlah Asma'ul Husna yang umum dikenal?
question.ms: Berapakah jumlah Asma'ul Husna yang umum diketahui?

explanation.en: A hadith in Bukhari states Allah has 99 names and whoever memorizes and lives by them enters Paradise. Scholars note Allah's names are not limited to only 99.
explanation.tr: Buhari'deki bir hadise göre Allah'ın 99 ismi vardır ve bunları ezberleyip gereğiyle yaşayan cennete girer. Alimler Allah'ın isimlerinin 99 ile sınırlı olmadığını belirtir.
explanation.id: Hadis dalam Bukhari menyebutkan Allah memiliki 99 nama, dan siapa yang menghafal serta mengamalkannya akan masuk surga. Ulama mencatat nama Allah tidak hanya terbatas 99.
explanation.ms: Hadis dalam Bukhari menyatakan Allah mempunyai 99 nama, dan sesiapa yang menghafal serta mengamalkannya akan masuk syurga. Ulama menyebut nama Allah tidak hanya terhad kepada 99.

question.en: Who accompanied the Prophet (SAW) in the cave during the Hijrah?
question.tr: Hicret sırasında Peygamber Efendimiz'e (SAV) mağarada kim eşlik etti?
question.id: Siapakah yang menemani Nabi (SAW) di gua saat Hijrah?
question.ms: Siapakah yang menemani Nabi (SAW) di gua semasa Hijrah?

explanation.en: Abu Bakr (R.A.) hid with the Prophet (SAW) in the Cave of Thawr for three days. The Quran calls him 'the second of two' in Surah At-Tawbah, verse 40.
explanation.tr: Hz. Ebubekir (R.A.) Peygamber (SAV) ile Sevr Mağarası'nda üç gün saklanmıştır. Kuran, Tevbe Suresi 40. ayette onu 'İkinin ikincisi' olarak anar.
explanation.id: Abu Bakar (R.A.) bersembunyi bersama Nabi (SAW) di Gua Tsur selama tiga hari. Al-Quran menyebutnya sebagai 'orang kedua dari dua' dalam Surah At-Taubah ayat 40.
explanation.ms: Abu Bakar (R.A.) bersembunyi bersama Nabi (SAW) di Gua Thur selama tiga hari. Al-Quran menyebut beliau sebagai 'orang kedua daripada dua' dalam Surah At-Taubah ayat 40.

question.en: How many Juz (sections) is the Quran divided into?
question.tr: Kuran-ı Kerim kaç cüze bölünmüştür?
question.id: Al-Quran dibagi menjadi berapa Juz?
question.ms: Al-Quran dibahagikan kepada berapa Juzuk?

explanation.en: The Quran is divided into 30 Juz of roughly equal length, allowing completion in one month by reading one Juz daily, especially during Ramadan.
explanation.tr: Kuran-ı Kerim yaklaşık eşit uzunlukta 30 cüze bölünmüştür. Özellikle Ramazan ayında günde bir cüz okunarak bir ayda hatim yapılmasına imkan sağlar.
explanation.id: Al-Quran dibagi menjadi 30 Juz yang panjangnya hampir sama, memungkinkan khatam dalam sebulan dengan membaca satu Juz per hari, terutama saat Ramadan.
explanation.ms: Al-Quran dibahagikan kepada 30 Juzuk yang panjangnya hampir sama, membolehkan khatam dalam sebulan dengan membaca satu Juzuk sehari, terutamanya semasa Ramadan.

question.en: Who is considered the 'Father of the Prophets'?
question.tr: 'Peygamberlerin Atası' olarak bilinen peygamber kimdir?
question.id: Siapakah yang dianggap sebagai 'Bapak Para Nabi'?
question.ms: Siapakah yang dianggap sebagai 'Bapa Para Nabi'?

explanation.en: Ibrahim (A.S.) is called Abu al-Anbiya because many later Prophets, including Ismail, Ishaq, Yaqub, Yusuf, Musa, Isa, and Muhammad (peace be upon them), are his descendants.
explanation.tr: Hz. İbrahim (A.S.) 'Ebu'l Enbiya' olarak anılır. Hz. İsmail, İshak, Yakup, Yusuf, Musa, İsa ve Muhammed (hepsine selam olsun) dahil birçok peygamber onun soyundan gelmiştir.
explanation.id: Nabi Ibrahim (A.S.) disebut Abul Anbiya karena banyak nabi setelahnya termasuk Ismail, Ishaq, Yaqub, Yusuf, Musa, Isa, dan Muhammad (semoga mereka dalam kedamaian) adalah keturunannya.
explanation.ms: Nabi Ibrahim (A.S.) dipanggil Abul Anbiya kerana ramai nabi selepasnya termasuk Ismail, Ishaq, Yaakub, Yusuf, Musa, Isa, dan Muhammad (semoga kesejahteraan ke atas mereka) adalah keturunannya.

question.en: What is the minimum amount of Zakat al-Fitr per person?
question.tr: Kişi başı fitre miktarı ne kadardır?
question.id: Berapa jumlah minimum Zakat Fitrah per orang?
question.ms: Berapakah jumlah minimum Zakat Fitrah setiap orang?

answer.en: One Sa' (approx 2.5-3 kg) of staple food
answer.ms: Satu Sa' (lebih kurang 2.5-3 kg) makanan ruji

explanation.en: Zakat al-Fitr is given before Eid al-Fitr prayer, typically one Sa' of staple food like dates, barley, or rice. Today it is often paid in cash equivalent.
explanation.tr: Fitre, Ramazan Bayramı namazından önce verilir; tipik olarak hurma, arpa veya pirinç gibi temel gıdadan bir Sa' miktarıdır. Günümüzde genellikle nakit olarak ödenir.
explanation.id: Zakat Fitrah diberikan sebelum salat Idulfitri, umumnya satu Sha' makanan pokok seperti kurma, jelai, atau beras. Saat ini sering dibayarkan dalam bentuk uang setara.
explanation.ms: Zakat Fitrah dikeluarkan sebelum solat Aidilfitri, biasanya satu Sa' makanan ruji seperti kurma, barli, atau beras. Kini, ia sering dibayar dalam bentuk wang setara.

question.en: What was the name of the Prophet's (SAW) mother?
question.tr: Peygamber Efendimiz'in (SAV) annesinin adı nedir?
question.id: Siapakah nama ibu Nabi (SAW)?
question.ms: Siapakah nama ibu Nabi (SAW)?

explanation.en: Aminah bint Wahb passed away when the Prophet (SAW) was about six years old, while returning from a visit to his father's grave in Medina. She was buried in Abwa.
explanation.tr: Amine bint Vehb, Peygamberimiz (SAV) yaklaşık altı yaşındayken, Medine'deki babasının kabrini ziyaretten dönerken vefat etmiştir. Ebva'da defnedilmiştir.
explanation.id: Aminah binti Wahab wafat saat Nabi (SAW) berusia sekitar enam tahun, ketika kembali dari ziarah makam ayahnya di Madinah. Beliau dimakamkan di Abwa.
explanation.ms: Aminah binti Wahab meninggal dunia ketika Nabi (SAW) berusia sekitar enam tahun, semasa pulang daripada menziarahi makam bapanya di Madinah. Beliau dimakamkan di Abwa.

question.en: Which verse of the Quran is considered the greatest?
question.tr: Kuran-ı Kerim'in en büyük ayeti hangisidir?
question.id: Ayat mana dalam Al-Quran yang dianggap paling agung?
question.ms: Ayat mana dalam Al-Quran yang dianggap paling agung?

explanation.en: The Prophet (SAW) told Ubayy ibn Ka'b that Ayat al-Kursi is the greatest verse in the Quran. It describes Allah's dominion, knowledge, and power over all creation.
explanation.tr: Peygamberimiz (SAV) Ubey bin Ka'b'a Ayetel Kürsi'nin Kuran'ın en büyük ayeti olduğunu bildirmiştir. Allah'ın hakimiyetini, ilmini ve yaratılmışlar üzerindeki kudretini anlatır.
explanation.id: Nabi (SAW) memberitahu Ubay bin Ka'ab bahwa Ayat Kursi adalah ayat teragung dalam Al-Quran. Ayat ini menggambarkan kekuasaan, ilmu, dan kekuatan Allah atas segala ciptaan.
explanation.ms: Nabi (SAW) memberitahu Ubai bin Ka'ab bahawa Ayat Kursi adalah ayat teragung dalam Al-Quran. Ayat ini menggambarkan kekuasaan, ilmu, dan kekuatan Allah ke atas segala ciptaan.

question.en: Who is known as 'Al-Faruq' (The Distinguisher of Truth from Falsehood)?
question.tr: 'El-Faruk' (Hakkı batıldan ayıran) lakabıyla anılan halife kimdir?
question.id: Siapakah yang dikenal sebagai 'Al-Faruq' (Pembeda Kebenaran dari Kebatilan)?
question.ms: Siapakah yang dikenali sebagai 'Al-Faruq' (Pembeza Kebenaran daripada Kebatilan)?

explanation.en: Umar (R.A.) was given this title by the Prophet (SAW) for his firmness in truth. Under his caliphate, Islam expanded into Persia, Egypt, and parts of the Byzantine Empire.
explanation.tr: Hz. Ömer'e (R.A.) bu lakap, haktaki kararlılığı nedeniyle Peygamber (SAV) tarafından verilmiştir. Halifeliği döneminde İslam, İran, Mısır ve Bizans topraklarına yayılmıştır.
explanation.id: Gelar ini diberikan Nabi (SAW) kepada Umar (R.A.) karena ketegasannya dalam kebenaran. Di masa kekhalifahannya, Islam meluas ke Persia, Mesir, dan sebagian Kekaisaran Bizantium.
explanation.ms: Gelaran ini diberikan oleh Nabi (SAW) kepada Umar (R.A.) kerana ketegasannya dalam kebenaran. Pada zaman pemerintahannya, Islam berkembang ke Parsi, Mesir, dan sebahagian Empayar Byzantine.

question.en: How many pillars of Iman (faith) are there?
question.tr: İman'ın şartı kaçtır?
question.id: Berapa jumlah rukun iman?
question.ms: Berapakah jumlah rukun iman?

explanation.en: The six pillars of Iman are: belief in Allah, His Angels, His Books, His Messengers, the Last Day, and divine decree (Qadar), both its good and bad.
explanation.tr: İmanın altı şartı: Allah'a, meleklerine, kitaplarına, peygamberlerine, ahiret gününe ve kadere, hayır ve şerrin Allah'tan olduğuna iman etmektir.
explanation.id: Enam rukun iman adalah: iman kepada Allah, malaikat-Nya, kitab-kitab-Nya, rasul-rasul-Nya, Hari Akhir, dan qada' serta qadar, baik dan buruknya.
explanation.ms: Enam rukun iman ialah: beriman kepada Allah, malaikat-Nya, kitab-kitab-Nya, rasul-rasul-Nya, Hari Akhirat, dan qada serta qadar, baik dan buruknya.

question.en: Which Prophet is mentioned as having built the Ark?
question.tr: Gemiyi inşa ettiği belirtilen peygamber kimdir?
question.id: Nabi mana yang disebutkan membangun bahtera?
question.ms: Nabi mana yang disebutkan membina bahtera?

explanation.en: Nuh (A.S.) built the Ark by Allah's command to save believers and pairs of animals from the Great Flood. He called his people to Tawhid for 950 years.
explanation.tr: Hz. Nuh (A.S.) Allah'ın emriyle, müminleri ve hayvanlardan çiftleri büyük tufandan kurtarmak için gemiyi inşa etti. Kavmini 950 yıl boyunca tevhide davet etti.
explanation.id: Nabi Nuh (A.S.) membangun bahtera atas perintah Allah untuk menyelamatkan orang beriman dan pasangan hewan dari banjir besar. Beliau berdakwah kepada kaumnya selama 950 tahun.
explanation.ms: Nabi Nuh (A.S.) membina bahtera atas perintah Allah untuk menyelamatkan orang beriman dan pasangan haiwan daripada banjir besar. Beliau berdakwah kepada kaumnya selama 950 tahun.

question.en: Which Surah is known as the 'Heart of the Quran'?
question.tr: 'Kuran'ın Kalbi' olarak bilinen sure hangisidir?
question.id: Surah mana yang dikenal sebagai 'Jantung Al-Quran'?
question.ms: Surah manakah yang dikenali sebagai 'Jantung Al-Quran'?

explanation.en: Surah Ya-Sin is widely called the 'Heart of the Quran'. It is commonly recited for the sick and deceased and highlights resurrection, tawhid, and the mercy of Allah.
explanation.tr: Yasin Suresi, 'Kuran'ın Kalbi' olarak anılır. Hastalara ve vefat edenlere okunması adet olmuş; diriliş, tevhid ve Allah'ın rahmetini anlatır.
explanation.id: Surah Yasin dikenal sebagai 'Jantung Al-Quran'. Surah ini sering dibaca untuk orang sakit dan yang wafat, serta membahas kebangkitan, tauhid, dan rahmat Allah.
explanation.ms: Surah Yasin dikenali sebagai 'Jantung Al-Quran'. Surah ini sering dibaca untuk orang sakit dan yang telah meninggal, serta membincangkan kebangkitan, tauhid, dan rahmat Allah.

question.en: How many verses are in Surah Al-Fatiha?
question.tr: Fatiha Suresi kaç ayettir?
question.id: Berapa jumlah ayat dalam Surah Al-Fatihah?
question.ms: Berapakah jumlah ayat dalam Surah Al-Fatihah?

explanation.en: Al-Fatiha has 7 verses and is recited in every rakat of every prayer. It is called 'the Seven Oft-Repeated' (As-Sab' al-Mathani) in the Quran.
explanation.tr: Fatiha Suresi 7 ayetten oluşur ve her rekatta okunur. Kuran'da 'Seb'u'l-Mesânî' (tekrarlanan yedi ayet) olarak anılır.
explanation.id: Al-Fatihah terdiri dari 7 ayat dan dibaca di setiap rakaat salat. Al-Quran menyebutnya 'As-Sab' al-Matsani' (tujuh ayat yang berulang).
explanation.ms: Al-Fatihah terdiri daripada 7 ayat dan dibaca pada setiap rakaat solat. Al-Quran menyebutnya 'As-Sab' al-Mathani' (tujuh ayat yang berulang).

question.en: What was the first word revealed to the Prophet (SAW)?
question.tr: Peygamberimize (SAV) indirilen ilk kelime nedir?
question.id: Apa kata pertama yang diturunkan kepada Nabi (SAW)?
question.ms: Apakah kata pertama yang diturunkan kepada Nabi (SAW)?

explanation.en: The first word was 'Iqra' — the opening of Surah Al-Alaq. Knowledge and reading are central to Islam from the very first verse revealed.
explanation.tr: İlk kelime Alak Suresi'nin başındaki 'İkra'dır. İlim ve okumak, vahyin ilk ayetinden itibaren İslam'ın merkezinde yer alır.
explanation.id: Kata pertama adalah 'Iqra' — pembuka Surah Al-Alaq. Ilmu dan membaca menjadi pusat Islam sejak ayat pertama diturunkan.
explanation.ms: Kata pertama ialah 'Iqra' — pembuka Surah Al-Alaq. Ilmu dan membaca menjadi tumpuan Islam sejak ayat pertama diturunkan.

question.en: In which language was the Quran revealed?
question.tr: Kuran-ı Kerim hangi dilde indirilmiştir?
question.id: Dalam bahasa apa Al-Quran diturunkan?
question.ms: Dalam bahasa apakah Al-Quran diturunkan?

explanation.en: Allah revealed the Quran in clear Arabic, as stated in Surah Yusuf (12:2). Its eloquence is considered inimitable, a miracle of the Prophet (SAW).
explanation.tr: Allah, Yusuf Suresi 2. ayette belirttiği gibi Kuran'ı apaçık Arapça olarak indirmiştir. Onun belagati taklit edilemez; Peygamberimizin (SAV) mucizesidir.
explanation.id: Allah menurunkan Al-Quran dalam bahasa Arab yang jelas, sebagaimana disebut dalam Surah Yusuf (12:2). Keindahannya tidak tertandingi dan merupakan mukjizat Nabi (SAW).
explanation.ms: Allah menurunkan Al-Quran dalam bahasa Arab yang jelas, sebagaimana disebut dalam Surah Yusuf (12:2). Keindahannya tidak tertandingi dan merupakan mukjizat Nabi (SAW).

question.en: Over how many years was the Quran revealed?
question.tr: Kuran kaç yılda indirilmiştir?
question.id: Selama berapa tahun Al-Quran diturunkan?
question.ms: Selama berapa tahun Al-Quran diturunkan?

explanation.en: Revelation came gradually over about 23 years — roughly 13 in Mecca and 10 in Medina — allowing guidance to be paired with real-life events and rulings.
explanation.tr: Vahiy yaklaşık 23 yıl boyunca kısım kısım indi; bunun yaklaşık 13 yılı Mekke'de, 10 yılı Medine'dedir. Bu sayede hükümler yaşanan olaylara göre geldi.
explanation.id: Wahyu turun secara bertahap selama sekitar 23 tahun — kurang lebih 13 tahun di Mekah dan 10 tahun di Madinah — sehingga petunjuk turun bersama peristiwanya.
explanation.ms: Wahyu turun secara beransur-ansur selama kira-kira 23 tahun — lebih kurang 13 tahun di Mekah dan 10 tahun di Madinah — supaya petunjuk sesuai dengan peristiwa yang berlaku.

question.en: Which Surah does not begin with 'Bismillah...'?
question.tr: Hangi sure 'Bismillah...' ile başlamaz?
question.id: Surah mana yang tidak diawali dengan 'Bismillah...'?
question.ms: Surah manakah yang tidak dimulakan dengan 'Bismillah...'?

explanation.en: Surah At-Tawbah is the only Surah that does not start with the Basmala. Scholars connect this to its stern tone regarding breakers of treaties.
explanation.tr: Besmelesiz başlayan tek sure Tevbe Suresi'dir. Alimler bunu, antlaşmaları bozanlara yönelik sert üslubuyla ilişkilendirir.
explanation.id: Surah At-Taubah adalah satu-satunya surah yang tidak diawali dengan Basmalah. Ulama mengaitkan hal ini dengan nadanya yang tegas terhadap pelanggar perjanjian.
explanation.ms: Surah At-Taubah ialah satu-satunya surah yang tidak didahului dengan Basmalah. Ulama mengaitkan hal ini dengan nadanya yang tegas terhadap pemungkir perjanjian.

question.en: Which Surah is called 'the Bride of the Quran'?
question.tr: 'Kuran'ın Gelini' olarak anılan sure hangisidir?
question.id: Surah mana yang disebut 'Pengantin Al-Quran'?
question.ms: Surah manakah yang digelar 'Pengantin Al-Quran'?

explanation.en: Ar-Rahman is called 'Arus al-Quran' for its rhythmic beauty. The refrain 'Which of your Lord's favors will you deny?' is repeated 31 times.
explanation.tr: Rahman Suresi'ne ahengi ve güzelliği sebebiyle 'Arûsü'l-Kuran' denir. 'Rabbinizin hangi nimetini yalanlayabilirsiniz?' ayeti 31 kez tekrarlanır.
explanation.id: Ar-Rahman disebut 'Arus Al-Quran' karena keindahan iramanya. Ayat 'Maka nikmat Tuhanmu yang manakah yang kamu dustakan?' diulang 31 kali.
explanation.ms: Ar-Rahman digelar 'Arus Al-Quran' kerana keindahan iramanya. Ayat 'Maka nikmat Tuhanmu yang manakah yang kamu dustakan?' diulang 31 kali.

question.en: Which Surah is said to equal one-third of the Quran?
question.tr: Kuran'ın üçte birine denk tutulan sure hangisidir?
question.id: Surah mana yang disebut setara dengan sepertiga Al-Quran?
question.ms: Surah manakah yang disebut menyamai satu pertiga Al-Quran?

explanation.en: The Prophet (SAW) said reciting Al-Ikhlas is equivalent to reading one-third of the Quran because its four verses summarize Allah's oneness.
explanation.tr: Peygamberimiz (SAV), dört ayetiyle Allah'ın birliğini özetleyen İhlas Suresi'nin okunmasının Kuran'ın üçte birine denk olduğunu buyurmuştur.
explanation.id: Nabi (SAW) bersabda bahwa membaca Al-Ikhlas setara dengan sepertiga Al-Quran, karena empat ayatnya merangkum keesaan Allah.
explanation.ms: Nabi (SAW) bersabda bahawa membaca Al-Ikhlas menyamai sepertiga Al-Quran, kerana empat ayatnya merangkumi keesaan Allah.

question.en: Which two short Surahs are known as 'Al-Mu'awwidhatayn' (the two refuges)?
question.tr: 'Muavvizeteyn' olarak bilinen iki kısa sure hangileridir?
question.id: Dua surah pendek mana yang dikenal sebagai 'Al-Mu'awwidzatain' (dua surah perlindungan)?
question.ms: Dua surah pendek manakah yang dikenali sebagai 'Al-Mu'awwidzatain' (dua surah perlindungan)?

explanation.en: Al-Falaq and An-Nas are recited for protection from harm, evil, and whispers of the shaytan. The Prophet (SAW) read them nightly before sleep.
explanation.tr: Felak ve Nas sureleri; zarardan, kötülüklerden ve şeytanın vesvesesinden korunmak için okunur. Peygamberimiz (SAV) her gece yatmadan önce okurdu.
explanation.id: Al-Falaq dan An-Nas dibaca untuk perlindungan dari bahaya, kejahatan, dan bisikan setan. Nabi (SAW) membacanya setiap malam sebelum tidur.
explanation.ms: Al-Falaq dan An-Nas dibaca untuk perlindungan daripada bahaya, kejahatan, dan bisikan syaitan. Nabi (SAW) membacanya setiap malam sebelum tidur.

question.en: How many times is the name 'Muhammad' mentioned in the Quran?
question.tr: 'Muhammed' ismi Kuran'da kaç kez geçer?
question.id: Berapa kali nama 'Muhammad' disebutkan dalam Al-Quran?
question.ms: Berapa kali nama 'Muhammad' disebut dalam Al-Quran?

explanation.en: The name 'Muhammad' appears 4 times (Al-Imran 144, Al-Ahzab 40, Muhammad 2, Al-Fath 29). The name 'Ahmad' appears once, in Surah As-Saff.
explanation.tr: 'Muhammed' ismi Kuran'da 4 kez geçer (Al-i İmran 144, Ahzab 40, Muhammed 2, Feth 29). 'Ahmed' ismi ise Saff Suresi'nde bir kez anılır.
explanation.id: Nama 'Muhammad' disebut 4 kali (Ali Imran 144, Al-Ahzab 40, Muhammad 2, Al-Fath 29). Nama 'Ahmad' disebut sekali, dalam Surah As-Saff.
explanation.ms: Nama 'Muhammad' disebut 4 kali (Ali Imran 144, Al-Ahzab 40, Muhammad 2, Al-Fath 29). Nama 'Ahmad' disebut sekali, dalam Surah As-Saff.

question.en: Which Surah contains the longest verse in the Quran?
question.tr: Kuran'daki en uzun ayet hangi suredededir?
question.id: Surah mana yang memuat ayat terpanjang dalam Al-Quran?
question.ms: Surah manakah yang mengandungi ayat terpanjang dalam Al-Quran?

answer.en: Surah Al-Baqarah (verse 282, the Verse of Debt)

explanation.en: Verse 282 of Al-Baqarah, the 'Ayah of Debt', instructs believers to write down debts — evidence of Islam's emphasis on justice and clear records.
explanation.tr: Bakara Suresi 282. ayet, 'Müdâyene ayeti' olarak bilinir ve borçların yazılmasını emreder. İslam'ın adalet ve kayıt tutmaya verdiği önemi gösterir.
explanation.id: Ayat 282 Al-Baqarah, 'Ayat Mudayanah', memerintahkan orang beriman mencatat hutang-piutang — bukti perhatian Islam pada keadilan dan dokumentasi.
explanation.ms: Ayat 282 Al-Baqarah, 'Ayat Mudayanah', memerintahkan orang beriman mencatat hutang — bukti perhatian Islam terhadap keadilan dan dokumentasi.

question.en: What are the disconnected letters at the start of some Surahs called?
question.tr: Bazı surelerin başındaki bağlantısız harflere ne ad verilir?
question.id: Disebut apa huruf-huruf terpisah di awal sebagian surah?
question.ms: Apakah nama huruf-huruf yang terpisah di awal sesetengah surah?

explanation.en: Letters like Alif-Lam-Mim and Ya-Sin open 29 Surahs. Their exact meaning is known only to Allah; scholars consider them a sign of the Quran's miraculous nature.
explanation.tr: Elif-Lam-Mim, Yasin gibi harfler 29 surenin başında yer alır. Manasını yalnızca Allah bilir; alimler Kuran'ın mucize oluşunun bir işareti olarak görür.
explanation.id: Huruf seperti Alif-Lam-Mim dan Ya-Sin membuka 29 surah. Maknanya hanya Allah yang tahu; ulama memandangnya sebagai tanda kemukjizatan Al-Quran.
explanation.ms: Huruf seperti Alif-Lam-Mim dan Ya-Sin membuka 29 surah. Maknanya hanya Allah yang mengetahui; ulama melihatnya sebagai tanda kemukjizatan Al-Quran.

question.en: What is another name for Surah Al-Fatiha?
question.tr: Fatiha Suresi'nin bir diğer adı nedir?
question.id: Apa nama lain Surah Al-Fatihah?
question.ms: Apakah nama lain Surah Al-Fatihah?

explanation.en: Al-Fatiha is called 'Umm al-Kitab' because it summarizes the core themes of the Quran: praise of Allah, worship, and guidance on the straight path.
explanation.tr: Fatiha Suresi; Allah'a hamd, kulluk ve doğru yola hidayet olmak üzere Kuran'ın temel konularını özetlediği için 'Ümmü'l-Kitâb' olarak anılır.
explanation.id: Al-Fatihah disebut 'Umm al-Kitab' karena merangkum tema inti Al-Quran: pujian pada Allah, ibadah, dan petunjuk jalan yang lurus.
explanation.ms: Al-Fatihah digelar 'Umm al-Kitab' kerana merangkumi tema utama Al-Quran: pujian kepada Allah, ibadah, dan petunjuk jalan yang lurus.

question.en: During whose caliphate was the Quran first compiled into a single book?
question.tr: Kuran ilk kez hangi halife döneminde tek bir kitap haline getirildi?
question.id: Pada masa khalifah siapa Al-Quran pertama kali dibukukan?
question.ms: Pada zaman khalifah manakah Al-Quran pertama kali dibukukan?

explanation.en: After many Quran memorizers died at Yamamah, Abu Bakr (R.A.) ordered Zayd ibn Thabit (R.A.) to gather the written Quran into a single mushaf.
explanation.tr: Yemame savaşında pek çok hafızın şehit olmasının ardından Hz. Ebubekir (R.A.), Zeyd bin Sabit'e (R.A.) Kuran'ı tek bir mushafta toplamasını emretti.
explanation.id: Setelah banyak penghafal Al-Quran wafat di Yamamah, Abu Bakar (R.A.) memerintahkan Zaid bin Tsabit (R.A.) mengumpulkan Al-Quran dalam satu mushaf.
explanation.ms: Selepas ramai penghafaz Al-Quran gugur di Yamamah, Abu Bakar (R.A.) mengarahkan Zaid bin Thabit (R.A.) mengumpulkan Al-Quran dalam satu mushaf.

question.en: Which caliph standardized the official Quran manuscript?
question.tr: Resmi Kuran nüshasını standartlaştıran halife kimdir?
question.id: Khalifah mana yang menyeragamkan mushaf resmi Al-Quran?
question.ms: Khalifah manakah yang menyeragamkan mushaf rasmi Al-Quran?

explanation.en: Uthman (R.A.) prepared official copies of the Quran and sent them to the major cities, ensuring a single, unified recitation across the Muslim world.
explanation.tr: Hz. Osman (R.A.), resmi Kuran nüshalarını çoğaltıp büyük şehirlere göndererek tüm İslam âleminde tek ve birleştirici bir kıraatin korunmasını sağladı.
explanation.id: Utsman (R.A.) membuat salinan resmi Al-Quran dan mengirimnya ke kota-kota besar, memastikan satu bacaan yang seragam di seluruh dunia Islam.
explanation.ms: Uthman (R.A.) menyediakan salinan rasmi Al-Quran dan menghantarnya ke bandar-bandar utama, memastikan satu bacaan yang seragam di seluruh dunia Islam.

question.en: Which Surah is named after a family (House of Imran)?
question.tr: Bir aile (İmran Ailesi) adını taşıyan sure hangisidir?
question.id: Surah mana yang dinamai dari sebuah keluarga (Keluarga Imran)?
question.ms: Surah manakah yang dinamakan sempena sebuah keluarga (Keluarga Imran)?

explanation.en: Surah Al-Imran is named after the family of Imran, who was the father of Maryam (A.S.). It discusses faith, the family of Isa (A.S.), and lessons from Uhud.
explanation.tr: Âl-i İmrân Suresi, Hz. Meryem'in (A.S.) babası olan İmran'ın ailesine izafe edilir. İman, Hz. İsa'nın (A.S.) ailesi ve Uhud dersleri işlenir.
explanation.id: Surah Ali Imran dinamai dari keluarga Imran, ayah Maryam (A.S.). Surah ini membahas keimanan, keluarga Nabi Isa (A.S.), dan pelajaran dari Perang Uhud.
explanation.ms: Surah Ali Imran dinamakan sempena keluarga Imran, ayah Maryam (A.S.). Surah ini membincangkan iman, keluarga Nabi Isa (A.S.), dan pengajaran dari Perang Uhud.

question.en: Which Surah is entirely about a single woman, the mother of Isa (A.S.)?
question.tr: Tamamen tek bir kadına — Hz. İsa'nın (A.S.) annesine — ayrılmış sure hangisidir?
question.id: Surah mana yang sepenuhnya membahas satu wanita, ibu Nabi Isa (A.S.)?
question.ms: Surah manakah yang keseluruhannya mengenai seorang wanita, ibu Nabi Isa (A.S.)?

explanation.en: Surah Maryam tells the story of Mary and the miraculous birth of Isa (A.S.). Maryam is the only woman mentioned by name in the Quran.
explanation.tr: Meryem Suresi, Hz. Meryem'in ve Hz. İsa'nın (A.S.) mucizevi doğumunun hikayesini anlatır. Meryem, Kuran'da ismen anılan tek kadındır.
explanation.id: Surah Maryam menceritakan kisah Maryam dan kelahiran mukjizat Nabi Isa (A.S.). Maryam adalah satu-satunya wanita yang namanya disebut langsung dalam Al-Quran.
explanation.ms: Surah Maryam mengisahkan Maryam dan kelahiran mukjizat Nabi Isa (A.S.). Maryam ialah satu-satunya wanita yang namanya disebut secara langsung dalam Al-Quran.

question.en: Which Surah is named after a metal used to build a barrier?
question.tr: Bir set yapımında kullanılan metalden adını alan sure hangisidir?
question.id: Surah mana yang dinamai dari logam untuk membangun tembok penghalang?
question.ms: Surah manakah yang dinamakan sempena logam untuk membina tembok penghalang?

explanation.en: Surah Al-Hadid mentions iron as a mighty creation with many benefits. The story of Dhul-Qarnayn in Surah Al-Kahf describes iron used to build a wall.
explanation.tr: Hadid Suresi demiri, büyük bir kudret ve pek çok fayda içeren bir yaratılış olarak anar. Kehf Suresi'nde Zülkarneyn'in setinde de demir kullanılır.
explanation.id: Surah Al-Hadid menyebut besi sebagai ciptaan yang memiliki kekuatan dan banyak manfaat. Kisah Dzulqarnain di Al-Kahfi menceritakan besi untuk membangun tembok.
explanation.ms: Surah Al-Hadid menyebut besi sebagai ciptaan yang kuat dengan banyak manfaat. Kisah Zulkarnain dalam Al-Kahfi menceritakan besi digunakan membina tembok.

question.en: Which Surah is named after a bee?
question.tr: Adını bir böcekten — arıdan — alan sure hangisidir?
question.id: Surah mana yang dinamai dari lebah?
question.ms: Surah manakah yang dinamakan sempena lebah?

explanation.en: An-Nahl mentions Allah's inspiration to the bee and the healing found in honey — a reminder of wisdom in Allah's smallest creations.
explanation.tr: Nahl Suresi, Allah'ın arıya ilhamını ve balda şifa bulunduğunu anlatır; en küçük yaratıklarda bile hikmet olduğunu hatırlatır.
explanation.id: An-Nahl menyebut ilham Allah pada lebah dan khasiat penyembuhan dalam madu — pengingat akan hikmah pada ciptaan terkecil sekalipun.
explanation.ms: An-Nahl menyebut ilham Allah kepada lebah dan khasiat madu sebagai penawar — peringatan tentang hikmah pada ciptaan terkecil sekalipun.

question.en: Which Surah mentions the story of the Companions of the Cave?
question.tr: Ashab-ı Kehf (Mağara Arkadaşları) kıssası hangi suredededir?
question.id: Surah mana yang mengisahkan Ashabul Kahfi (penghuni gua)?
question.ms: Surah manakah yang mengisahkan Ashabul Kahfi (penghuni gua)?

explanation.en: Al-Kahf narrates four stories: the Youths of the Cave, the Man of Two Gardens, Musa and Khidr, and Dhul-Qarnayn. Reading it on Fridays is highly recommended.
explanation.tr: Kehf Suresi dört kıssa anlatır: Ashab-ı Kehf, İki Bahçe Sahibi, Hz. Musa ile Hızır ve Zülkarneyn. Cuma günleri okunması tavsiye edilir.
explanation.id: Al-Kahfi menceritakan empat kisah: Pemuda Gua, Pemilik Dua Kebun, Musa dan Khidir, serta Dzulqarnain. Membacanya pada hari Jumat sangat dianjurkan.
explanation.ms: Al-Kahfi menceritakan empat kisah: Pemuda Gua, Pemilik Dua Kebun, Musa dan Khidir, serta Zulkarnain. Membacanya pada hari Jumaat amat digalakkan.

question.en: In which month was the Quran first revealed?
question.tr: Kuran-ı Kerim hangi ayda indirilmeye başlandı?
question.id: Pada bulan apa Al-Quran pertama kali diturunkan?
question.ms: Pada bulan apa Al-Quran pertama kali diturunkan?

explanation.en: Allah says in Surah Al-Baqarah (2:185): 'The month of Ramadan in which was revealed the Quran...'. Revelation began on Laylat al-Qadr.
explanation.tr: Allah Bakara Suresi 185. ayette buyurur: 'Ramazan ayı, Kuran'ın indirildiği aydır.' Vahiy, Kadir Gecesi'nde başlamıştır.
explanation.id: Allah berfirman dalam Al-Baqarah (2:185): 'Bulan Ramadan, bulan yang di dalamnya diturunkan Al-Quran...'. Wahyu pertama turun pada Lailatul Qadar.
explanation.ms: Allah berfirman dalam Al-Baqarah (2:185): 'Bulan Ramadan, bulan yang di dalamnya diturunkan Al-Quran...'. Wahyu pertama turun pada Lailatul Qadar.

question.en: What is the night on which the Quran began to be revealed called?
question.tr: Kuran'ın indirilmeye başlandığı geceye ne ad verilir?
question.id: Disebut apa malam ketika Al-Quran mulai diturunkan?
question.ms: Apakah nama malam ketika Al-Quran mula diturunkan?

explanation.en: Laylat al-Qadr is described in the Quran as 'better than a thousand months'. It is sought in the last ten nights of Ramadan, especially the odd nights.
explanation.tr: Kadir Gecesi, Kuran'da 'bin aydan daha hayırlı' olarak nitelenir. Ramazan'ın son on gecesinde, özellikle tek gecelerde aranır.
explanation.id: Lailatul Qadar digambarkan dalam Al-Quran 'lebih baik dari seribu bulan'. Dicari pada sepuluh malam terakhir Ramadan, khususnya malam-malam ganjil.
explanation.ms: Lailatul Qadar digambarkan dalam Al-Quran 'lebih baik daripada seribu bulan'. Dicari pada sepuluh malam terakhir Ramadan, terutama malam-malam ganjil.

question.en: What is the only woman mentioned by name in the Quran?
question.tr: Kuran'da ismen anılan tek kadın kimdir?
question.id: Siapakah satu-satunya wanita yang namanya disebut dalam Al-Quran?
question.ms: Siapakah satu-satunya wanita yang namanya disebut dalam Al-Quran?

explanation.en: Other women are referenced by role ('wife of Pharaoh', 'mother of Musa'), but only Maryam is named. A Surah is also named after her.
explanation.tr: Diğer kadınlar rolleriyle anılır ('Firavun'un hanımı', 'Musa'nın annesi'), fakat ismen anılan tek kadın Hz. Meryem'dir. Ayrıca adına bir sure vardır.
explanation.id: Wanita lain disebut melalui peran ('istri Firaun', 'ibu Musa'), tapi hanya Maryam yang namanya disebut langsung. Ada pula surah yang dinamai dengannya.
explanation.ms: Wanita lain dirujuk melalui peranan ('isteri Firaun', 'ibu Musa'), tetapi hanya Maryam yang namanya disebut secara langsung. Sebuah surah juga dinamakan sempenanya.

question.en: What are the last two Surahs of the Quran?
question.tr: Kuran'ın son iki suresi hangileridir?
question.id: Dua surah terakhir dalam Al-Quran adalah?
question.ms: Apakah dua surah terakhir Al-Quran?

explanation.en: These two short Surahs close the Quran as a plea for protection from Allah against every harm, seen and unseen.
explanation.tr: Bu iki kısa sure; görünen ve görünmeyen her türlü kötülükten Allah'a sığınma çağrısıyla Kuran'ı tamamlar.
explanation.id: Dua surah pendek ini menutup Al-Quran dengan permohonan perlindungan kepada Allah dari segala keburukan, yang nampak maupun tersembunyi.
explanation.ms: Dua surah pendek ini menutup Al-Quran dengan permohonan perlindungan kepada Allah daripada segala keburukan, yang nyata mahupun tersembunyi.

question.en: What is the opening Surah of the Quran called?
question.tr: Kuran'ın ilk suresinin adı nedir?
question.id: Apa nama surah pembuka Al-Quran?
question.ms: Apakah nama surah pembuka Al-Quran?

explanation.en: Al-Fatiha is the 'Opening' and the heart of every prayer. Its seven verses teach us how to praise Allah and ask for guidance to the straight path.
explanation.tr: Fatiha Suresi, 'açılış' anlamına gelir ve her namazın kalbidir. Yedi ayetiyle Allah'a nasıl hamdedileceğini ve doğru yola iletilmeyi dilemeyi öğretir.
explanation.id: Al-Fatihah berarti 'pembukaan' dan menjadi jantung setiap salat. Tujuh ayatnya mengajarkan cara memuji Allah dan memohon petunjuk jalan lurus.
explanation.ms: Al-Fatihah bermaksud 'pembukaan' dan menjadi inti setiap solat. Tujuh ayatnya mengajar kita memuji Allah dan memohon petunjuk ke jalan yang lurus.

question.en: How many rakats are in the Dhuhr obligatory prayer?
question.tr: Öğle namazının farzı kaç rekattır?
question.id: Berapa rakaat salat fardu Zuhur?
question.ms: Berapa rakaat solat fardu Zohor?

explanation.en: Dhuhr is four rakats of fard. It is commonly preceded by 4 sunnah and followed by 2, totalling 10 rakats for those observing all sunan.
explanation.tr: Öğle namazının farzı 4 rekattır. Öncesinde 4, sonrasında 2 rekat sünnet kılındığında toplam 10 rekat olur.
explanation.id: Zuhur terdiri dari 4 rakaat fardu, umumnya didahului 4 rakaat sunnah dan diakhiri 2 rakaat sunnah, total 10 rakaat bagi yang menyempurnakan sunahnya.
explanation.ms: Zohor ialah 4 rakaat fardu. Lazimnya didahului 4 rakaat sunat dan diikuti 2 rakaat sunat, berjumlah 10 rakaat bagi yang melengkapkan sunatnya.

question.en: How many rakats are in the Asr obligatory prayer?
question.tr: İkindi namazının farzı kaç rekattır?
question.id: Berapa rakaat salat fardu Asar?
question.ms: Berapa rakaat solat fardu Asar?

explanation.en: Asr is four rakats of fard. The Prophet (SAW) warned that whoever misses Asr, it is as if they have lost their family and wealth.
explanation.tr: İkindi namazının farzı 4 rekattır. Peygamberimiz (SAV), ikindiyi kaçıranın sanki ailesini ve malını kaybetmiş gibi olduğunu buyurmuştur.
explanation.id: Asar terdiri dari 4 rakaat fardu. Nabi (SAW) memperingatkan bahwa yang meninggalkan salat Asar bagaikan kehilangan keluarga dan hartanya.
explanation.ms: Asar ialah 4 rakaat fardu. Nabi (SAW) memperingatkan bahawa sesiapa yang meninggalkan Asar seolah-olah kehilangan keluarga dan hartanya.

question.en: How many rakats are in the Maghrib obligatory prayer?
question.tr: Akşam namazının farzı kaç rekattır?
question.id: Berapa rakaat salat fardu Maghrib?
question.ms: Berapa rakaat solat fardu Maghrib?

explanation.en: Maghrib is the only daily fard prayer with three rakats. Two rakats of sunnah follow the fard.
explanation.tr: Akşam namazı, üç rekatlı tek farz vakit namazıdır. Farzın ardından 2 rekat sünnet kılınır.
explanation.id: Maghrib adalah satu-satunya salat fardu harian yang tiga rakaat. Setelah fardu ada 2 rakaat sunnah.
explanation.ms: Maghrib ialah satu-satunya solat fardu harian yang tiga rakaat. Selepas fardu, ada 2 rakaat sunat.

question.en: How many rakats are in the Isha obligatory prayer?
question.tr: Yatsı namazının farzı kaç rekattır?
question.id: Berapa rakaat salat fardu Isya?
question.ms: Berapa rakaat solat fardu Isyak?

explanation.en: Isha is four rakats of fard. Witr is prayed afterward and is considered the final prayer of the day.
explanation.tr: Yatsı namazının farzı 4 rekattır. Ardından Vitir namazı kılınır ve günün son namazı sayılır.
explanation.id: Isya terdiri dari 4 rakaat fardu. Setelahnya dikerjakan salat Witir, yang dianggap salat penutup malam.
explanation.ms: Isyak ialah 4 rakaat fardu. Selepasnya didirikan solat Witir, yang dianggap solat penutup malam.

question.en: What is the call to prayer called?
question.tr: Namaza çağıran sese ne ad verilir?
question.id: Apa nama panggilan untuk salat?
question.ms: Apakah nama panggilan untuk solat?

explanation.en: The adhan is recited aloud from the mosque when each prayer time enters, proclaiming tawhid and inviting believers to salah.
explanation.tr: Ezan, her namaz vakti girdiğinde camiden yüksek sesle okunur; tevhidi ilan eder ve inananları namaza davet eder.
explanation.id: Adzan dikumandangkan dari masjid saat waktu salat masuk, memproklamasikan tauhid dan mengajak umat beriman untuk salat.
explanation.ms: Azan dilaungkan dari masjid apabila waktu solat masuk, mengisytiharkan tauhid dan mengajak orang beriman menunaikan solat.

question.en: What is the second call given right before the congregational prayer starts?
question.tr: Cemaatle namaza geçmeden hemen önce okunan ikinci çağrıya ne denir?
question.id: Apa nama panggilan kedua yang dikumandangkan tepat sebelum salat berjamaah dimulai?
question.ms: Apakah nama panggilan kedua yang dilaungkan sejurus sebelum solat berjemaah dimulakan?

explanation.en: The iqamah signals the congregation to stand up and form rows. It shortens some phrases of the adhan and adds 'Qad qamatis salah'.
explanation.tr: Kâmet, cemaati ayağa kalkıp saf tutmaya çağırır. Ezandaki bazı cümleler kısaltılarak 'Kad kâmeti's-salâh' eklenir.
explanation.id: Iqamah memberi tanda jamaah berdiri dan merapatkan saf. Beberapa kalimat adzan dipadatkan dan ditambah 'Qad qamatish shalah'.
explanation.ms: Iqamat memberi isyarat jemaah berdiri dan meluruskan saf. Beberapa lafaz azan diringkaskan dan ditambah 'Qad qamatis solah'.

question.en: How many rakats is the Friday (Jumu'ah) obligatory prayer?
question.tr: Cuma namazının farzı kaç rekattır?
question.id: Berapa rakaat salat fardu Jumat?
question.ms: Berapa rakaat solat fardu Jumaat?

explanation.en: Jumu'ah replaces Dhuhr on Friday. It consists of two rakats prayed in congregation, preceded by a khutbah (sermon) delivered by the imam.
explanation.tr: Cuma namazı, Cuma günü öğle namazının yerine geçer. İmamın okuduğu hutbenin ardından iki rekat cemaatle kılınır.
explanation.id: Salat Jumat menggantikan Zuhur di hari Jumat. Terdiri dari dua rakaat berjamaah, didahului khutbah oleh imam.
explanation.ms: Solat Jumaat menggantikan Zohor pada hari Jumaat. Ia dua rakaat berjemaah, didahului khutbah oleh imam.

question.en: What is the voluntary prayer performed late at night called?
question.tr: Gecenin geç saatlerinde kılınan nafile namaza ne denir?
question.id: Apa nama salat sunnah yang dikerjakan di tengah malam?
question.ms: Apakah nama solat sunat yang dikerjakan pada tengah malam?

explanation.en: Tahajjud is a highly recommended night prayer performed after sleep. Allah praises those who stand in prayer at night in many verses of the Quran.
explanation.tr: Teheccüd, uyuduktan sonra kalkıp kılınan, faziletli bir nafile namazdır. Kuran'da geceleri ibadete duranlar pek çok ayette övülür.
explanation.id: Tahajud adalah salat sunnah malam yang sangat dianjurkan, dikerjakan setelah tidur. Allah memuji mereka yang salat malam dalam banyak ayat Al-Quran.
explanation.ms: Tahajud ialah solat sunat malam yang sangat digalakkan, didirikan selepas tidur. Allah memuji mereka yang bangun beribadat malam dalam banyak ayat Al-Quran.

question.en: What is the voluntary morning prayer after sunrise called?
question.tr: Güneş doğduktan sonra kılınan nafile namaza ne denir?
question.id: Apa nama salat sunnah pagi setelah matahari terbit?
question.ms: Apakah nama solat sunat pagi selepas matahari terbit?

explanation.en: Duha is prayed after the sun has fully risen until just before Dhuhr. The Prophet (SAW) described it as charity on behalf of every joint of the body.
explanation.tr: Kuşluk namazı, güneş iyice yükseldikten sonra öğle vaktine yakın bir zamana kadar kılınır. Peygamber (SAV) bunun, her eklem için bir sadaka olduğunu bildirmiştir.
explanation.id: Duha dikerjakan setelah matahari naik sempurna hingga menjelang Zuhur. Nabi (SAW) menyebutnya sebagai sedekah untuk setiap sendi tubuh.
explanation.ms: Dhuha didirikan selepas matahari naik tinggi sehingga menjelang Zohor. Nabi (SAW) menyebutnya sebagai sedekah bagi setiap sendi tubuh.

question.en: How many rakats is Witr commonly prayed as?
question.tr: Vitir namazı genellikle kaç rekat kılınır?
question.id: Biasanya berapa rakaat salat Witir dikerjakan?
question.ms: Berapa rakaat biasanya solat Witir dikerjakan?

explanation.en: Witr is an odd-numbered prayer — 1, 3, 5, 7, or more. Three rakats is the most common practice, making Isha's night ending 'odd'.
explanation.tr: Vitir namazı tek sayılı kılınır — 1, 3, 5, 7 veya daha fazla. En yaygın uygulama 3 rekattır; bu sayede gecenin sonu 'tek' olur.
explanation.id: Witir dikerjakan dalam rakaat ganjil — 1, 3, 5, 7, atau lebih. Yang paling umum adalah 3 rakaat, menjadikan penutup malam 'ganjil'.
explanation.ms: Witir dikerjakan dalam rakaat ganjil — 1, 3, 5, 7, atau lebih. Yang paling lazim ialah 3 rakaat, menjadikan penutup malam 'ganjil'.

question.en: What is the dry ablution using clean earth called?
question.tr: Temiz toprakla yapılan kuru abdeste ne denir?
question.id: Apa nama bersuci dengan tanah bersih?
question.ms: Apakah nama bersuci menggunakan tanah yang bersih?

explanation.en: Tayammum replaces wudu or ghusl when water is unavailable or harmful. One strikes clean earth lightly, then wipes the face and hands with the intent of purification.
explanation.tr: Teyemmüm; su bulunmadığında veya kullanımı zararlıysa abdest ve gusül yerine geçer. Temiz toprağa dokunulup niyetle yüz ve eller mesh edilir.
explanation.id: Tayamum menggantikan wudu atau mandi besar saat air tak tersedia atau berbahaya. Tangan diusapkan pada tanah bersih, lalu diusapkan ke wajah dan tangan dengan niat bersuci.
explanation.ms: Tayamum menggantikan wuduk atau mandi besar apabila air tidak ada atau memudaratkan. Tangan disapu pada tanah bersih, kemudian disapu ke muka dan tangan dengan niat bersuci.

question.en: In which direction do Muslims face during prayer?
question.tr: Namazda hangi yöne dönülür?
question.id: Ke arah mana umat Islam menghadap dalam salat?
question.ms: Ke arah manakah umat Islam menghadap dalam solat?

answer.en: Toward the Qibla (the Ka'bah in Mecca)

explanation.en: The qibla was changed from Jerusalem to the Ka'bah in 2 AH, unifying Muslims around a single focal point of worship.
explanation.tr: Kıble, hicretin 2. yılında Kudüs'ten Kabe'ye çevrilmiştir; bu değişiklik Müslümanları tek bir ibadet merkezinde birleştirmiştir.
explanation.id: Kiblat berubah dari Baitul Maqdis ke Ka'bah pada tahun ke-2 Hijriah, menyatukan umat Islam pada satu titik fokus ibadah.
explanation.ms: Kiblat ditukar daripada Baitul Maqdis ke Kaabah pada tahun ke-2 Hijrah, menyatukan umat Islam pada satu tumpuan ibadah.

question.en: What is the shortening of a 4-rakat prayer to 2 while travelling called?
question.tr: Seferde dört rekatlı namazın iki rekata kısaltılmasına ne denir?
question.id: Apa istilah memperpendek salat 4 rakaat menjadi 2 saat bepergian?
question.ms: Apakah istilah memendekkan solat 4 rakaat kepada 2 ketika musafir?

explanation.en: Qasr is a mercy from Allah for travellers. Dhuhr, Asr, and Isha become two rakats each; Fajr and Maghrib remain unchanged.
explanation.tr: Kasr, yolculardaki bir Allah rahmetidir. Öğle, ikindi ve yatsı ikişer rekat kılınır; sabah ve akşam namazları değişmez.
explanation.id: Qashar adalah rahmat Allah bagi musafir. Zuhur, Asar, dan Isya menjadi dua rakaat; Subuh dan Maghrib tetap seperti biasa.
explanation.ms: Qasar ialah rahmat Allah kepada musafir. Zohor, Asar, dan Isyak menjadi dua rakaat; Subuh dan Maghrib kekal seperti biasa.

question.en: What does the word 'Sawm' mean in Arabic?
question.tr: Arapçada 'Savm' kelimesi ne anlama gelir?
question.id: Apa arti kata 'Shaum' dalam bahasa Arab?
question.ms: Apakah maksud perkataan 'Saum' dalam bahasa Arab?

explanation.en: Sawm literally means 'to abstain'. Religiously, it is refraining from food, drink, and intimate relations from dawn (Fajr) until sunset (Maghrib).
explanation.tr: 'Savm' sözlükte 'tutmak, alıkoymak' demektir. Dinde fecirden akşama kadar yemek, içmek ve cinsel ilişkiden kaçınmaktır.
explanation.id: Shaum secara bahasa berarti 'menahan diri'. Secara syar'i, ia menahan diri dari makan, minum, dan hubungan intim sejak Subuh hingga Maghrib.
explanation.ms: Saum dari segi bahasa bermaksud 'menahan diri'. Secara syarak, ia menahan diri daripada makan, minum, dan hubungan kelamin dari Subuh hingga Maghrib.

question.en: In which Islamic month is Hajj performed?
question.tr: Hac hangi hicri ayda ifa edilir?
question.id: Ibadah haji dilaksanakan pada bulan Islam apa?
question.ms: Ibadah haji dilaksanakan pada bulan Islam apa?

explanation.en: Hajj takes place in the first ten days of Dhul Hijjah, the 12th month of the Islamic calendar. Eid al-Adha falls on the 10th.
explanation.tr: Hac, hicri takvimin 12. ayı olan Zilhicce'nin ilk on gününde eda edilir. Kurban Bayramı 10. günde kutlanır.
explanation.id: Haji dilaksanakan pada sepuluh hari pertama Dzulhijjah, bulan ke-12 kalender Islam. Idul Adha jatuh pada tanggal 10.
explanation.ms: Haji dilaksanakan pada sepuluh hari pertama Zulhijjah, bulan ke-12 kalendar Islam. Aidiladha jatuh pada 10 haribulan.

question.en: What are the boundary points where pilgrims enter Ihram called?
question.tr: Hacıların ihrama girdikleri sınır noktalarına ne denir?
question.id: Disebut apa titik batas tempat jamaah haji mengenakan Ihram?
question.ms: Apakah nama titik sempadan tempat jemaah haji memakai Ihram?

explanation.en: Miqat are the designated boundaries around Mecca. Before crossing them, pilgrims must enter Ihram with intention for Hajj or Umrah.
explanation.tr: Mikât, Mekke çevresinde belirlenmiş sınırlardır. Hacılar bu sınırları geçmeden hac ya da umre niyetiyle ihrama girmelidir.
explanation.id: Miqat adalah batas-batas yang ditentukan di sekitar Mekah. Sebelum melintasinya, jamaah wajib mengenakan Ihram dengan niat Haji atau Umrah.
explanation.ms: Miqat ialah sempadan yang ditetapkan di sekeliling Mekah. Sebelum melintasinya, jemaah wajib memakai Ihram dengan niat Haji atau Umrah.

question.en: How many times do pilgrims circle the Ka'bah in Tawaf?
question.tr: Hacılar tavafta Kabe'yi kaç defa döner?
question.id: Berapa kali jamaah mengelilingi Ka'bah dalam Tawaf?
question.ms: Berapa kali jemaah mengelilingi Kaabah dalam Tawaf?

explanation.en: Tawaf is performed counter-clockwise around the Ka'bah seven times, starting and ending at the Black Stone (Hajar al-Aswad).
explanation.tr: Tavaf; Hacerü'l-Esved'den başlayıp yine orada bitmek üzere, Kabe'nin çevresinde saat yönünün tersine yedi kez yapılır.
explanation.id: Tawaf dilakukan mengelilingi Ka'bah berlawanan arah jarum jam sebanyak tujuh kali, dimulai dan diakhiri di Hajar Aswad.
explanation.ms: Tawaf dilakukan mengelilingi Kaabah bertentangan arah jarum jam sebanyak tujuh kali, bermula dan berakhir di Hajar al-Aswad.

question.en: What is the ritual walk between Safa and Marwa called?
question.tr: Safa ile Merve arasındaki ritüel yürüyüşe ne denir?
question.id: Apa nama ritual berjalan antara Shafa dan Marwah?
question.ms: Apakah nama ritual berjalan antara Safa dan Marwah?

explanation.en: Sa'i is performed seven times between the two hills, commemorating Hajar's search for water for her son Ismail (A.S.), which led to the miracle of Zamzam.
explanation.tr: Sa'y; Hz. Hacer'in oğlu İsmail için su arayışını anmak üzere iki tepe arasında yedi kez yapılır. Bu arayış Zemzem mucizesiyle sonuçlanmıştır.
explanation.id: Sa'i dilakukan tujuh kali antara kedua bukit, mengenang pencarian Hajar atas air untuk putranya Ismail (A.S.) yang berakhir dengan mukjizat Zamzam.
explanation.ms: Saie dilakukan tujuh kali antara kedua bukit, mengingati pencarian Hajar untuk mendapatkan air bagi anaknya Ismail (A.S.) yang berakhir dengan mukjizat Zamzam.

question.en: What is the standard Zakat rate on accumulated wealth/cash?
question.tr: Biriktirilmiş mal/nakit için zekat oranı nedir?
question.id: Berapa tarif zakat mal atas kekayaan/uang yang terkumpul?
question.ms: Berapakah kadar zakat ke atas harta/wang yang terkumpul?

explanation.en: When wealth exceeds the nisab and is held for one lunar year, 2.5% is given to those deserving of zakat, purifying the wealth and the soul.
explanation.tr: Mal nisab miktarını aşıp üzerinden bir kameri yıl geçtiğinde, %2,5'i zekat olarak verilir; bu mal ve nefsi arındırır.
explanation.id: Ketika harta mencapai nisab dan telah haul (setahun hijriah), 2,5% dikeluarkan untuk para mustahik, membersihkan harta dan jiwa.
explanation.ms: Apabila harta mencapai nisab dan telah genap haul (setahun hijrah), 2.5% dikeluarkan kepada asnaf zakat, menyucikan harta dan diri.

question.en: What nullifies wudu?
question.tr: Abdesti ne bozar?
question.id: Apa saja yang membatalkan wudu?
question.ms: Apakah yang membatalkan wuduk?

answer.en: Using the toilet, passing wind, deep sleep, or loss of consciousness
answer.tr: Tuvalete gitmek, yel çıkarmak, derin uyumak veya bilincini kaybetmek
answer.id: Buang air, kentut, tidur nyenyak, atau hilang kesadaran
answer.ms: Buang air, kentut, tidur nyenyak, atau hilang kesedaran

explanation.en: These things break the state of purity. After any of them, one must perform wudu again before the next prayer.
explanation.tr: Bu haller taharet halini bozar. Herhangi biri gerçekleştikten sonra yeni bir abdest almak gerekir.
explanation.id: Hal-hal ini membatalkan keadaan bersuci. Setelahnya, wajib berwudu kembali sebelum salat berikutnya.
explanation.ms: Perkara-perkara ini membatalkan keadaan bersuci. Selepasnya, wajib berwuduk semula sebelum solat seterusnya.

question.en: What is the state of ritual consecration for Hajj/Umrah called?
question.tr: Hac ve umre için girilen ibadet haline ne denir?
question.id: Apa nama keadaan suci khusus untuk Haji/Umrah?
question.ms: Apakah nama keadaan suci khusus untuk Haji/Umrah?

explanation.en: Entering Ihram is done at the miqat with two simple white garments for men and modest clothing for women, along with the intention to perform Hajj or Umrah.
explanation.tr: İhrama, mikât noktasında niyetle girilir. Erkekler iki parça beyaz bez bürünür, kadınlar ise mutad tesettüre uygun sade bir kıyafet giyer.
explanation.id: Ihram dikenakan di miqat dengan dua kain putih sederhana bagi laki-laki dan pakaian syar'i bagi perempuan, serta niat untuk Haji atau Umrah.
explanation.ms: Ihram dikenakan di miqat dengan dua helai kain putih sederhana bagi lelaki dan pakaian yang menutup aurat bagi wanita, serta niat untuk Haji atau Umrah.

question.en: What was the name of the Prophet's (SAW) father?
question.tr: Peygamber Efendimiz'in (SAV) babasının adı nedir?
question.id: Siapakah nama ayah Nabi (SAW)?
question.ms: Siapakah nama bapa Nabi (SAW)?

explanation.en: Abdullah passed away before the Prophet (SAW) was born, leaving him an orphan. He was buried in Medina, where the Prophet later visited his grave.
explanation.tr: Abdullah, Peygamber Efendimiz (SAV) doğmadan önce vefat ederek onu babasız bırakmıştır. Medine'de defnedilmiş, ileride Peygamber kabrini ziyaret etmiştir.
explanation.id: Abdullah wafat sebelum Nabi (SAW) lahir, sehingga beliau lahir sebagai yatim. Makamnya di Madinah, yang kelak diziarahi oleh Nabi.
explanation.ms: Abdullah wafat sebelum Nabi (SAW) dilahirkan, lalu Baginda dilahirkan sebagai yatim. Makamnya di Madinah, yang kemudian diziarahi oleh Baginda.

question.en: Who was the wet nurse of Prophet Muhammad (SAW)?
question.tr: Peygamber Efendimiz'in (SAV) sütannesi kimdir?
question.id: Siapakah ibu susuan Nabi Muhammad (SAW)?
question.ms: Siapakah ibu susuan Nabi Muhammad (SAW)?

explanation.en: It was Arab custom to send infants to the desert. Halimah nursed the Prophet (SAW) for several years, and her family was blessed greatly by his presence.
explanation.tr: Araplarda bebekleri çöle göndermek adetti. Halime, Peygamberimizi (SAV) yıllarca emzirdi ve onun bereketiyle ailesi büyük nimetlere kavuştu.
explanation.id: Tradisi Arab mengirim bayi ke padang pasir. Halimah menyusui Nabi (SAW) selama beberapa tahun, dan keluarganya penuh berkah karena kehadiran beliau.
explanation.ms: Tradisi Arab menghantar bayi ke padang pasir. Halimah menyusukan Nabi (SAW) selama beberapa tahun, dan keluarganya diberkati dengan kehadiran Baginda.

question.en: Who raised Prophet Muhammad (SAW) after his grandfather's death?
question.tr: Peygamber Efendimiz'i (SAV) dedesinin vefatından sonra kim büyüttü?
question.id: Siapakah yang membesarkan Nabi Muhammad (SAW) setelah wafatnya kakeknya?
question.ms: Siapakah yang membesarkan Nabi Muhammad (SAW) selepas kewafatan datuknya?

explanation.en: After Abdul-Muttalib's death, Abu Talib took custody of the Prophet (SAW). He protected and cared for him even during the early years of prophethood.
explanation.tr: Abdülmuttalib'in vefatından sonra Ebu Talib Peygamberimizi (SAV) himayesine aldı; peygamberliğin ilk yıllarında dahi onu korudu ve kolladı.
explanation.id: Setelah wafat Abdul Muthalib, Abu Thalib mengasuh Nabi (SAW). Ia melindungi dan merawat beliau bahkan di masa-masa awal kenabian.
explanation.ms: Selepas kewafatan Abdul Muttalib, Abu Talib menjaga Nabi (SAW). Beliau melindungi dan memelihara Baginda bahkan pada awal kenabian.

question.en: What was the Prophet's (SAW) title before prophethood?
question.tr: Peygamberimize (SAV) peygamberlikten önce verilen lakap neydi?
question.id: Apa gelar Nabi (SAW) sebelum kenabian?
question.ms: Apakah gelaran Nabi (SAW) sebelum kenabian?

explanation.en: The people of Mecca called him Al-Amin because of his honesty and reliability, trusting him even to safeguard their valuables before prophethood.
explanation.tr: Mekkeliler, Peygamberimizin (SAV) doğruluğu ve güvenilirliği sebebiyle ona 'El-Emîn' derdi; peygamberlikten önce dahi kıymetli eşyalarını ona emanet ederlerdi.
explanation.id: Penduduk Mekah memanggil beliau Al-Amin karena kejujuran dan dapat dipercayanya, bahkan sebelum kenabian mereka menitipkan barang berharga padanya.
explanation.ms: Penduduk Mekah menggelar Baginda Al-Amin kerana kejujuran dan amanahnya, bahkan sebelum kenabian mereka menyerahkan barang berharga kepada Baginda.

question.en: At what age did the Prophet (SAW) marry Khadijah (R.A.)?
question.tr: Peygamberimiz (SAV) Hz. Hatice (R.A.) ile kaç yaşında evlendi?
question.id: Pada usia berapa Nabi (SAW) menikahi Khadijah (R.A.)?
question.ms: Pada usia berapa Nabi (SAW) berkahwin dengan Khadijah (R.A.)?

explanation.en: Khadijah (R.A.) proposed to him after seeing his honesty and character in her trade business. Their marriage was one of deep love and mutual support.
explanation.tr: Hz. Hatice (R.A.) ticaretinde onun dürüstlüğünü ve ahlakını görünce kendisine evlilik teklif etmiştir. Evlilikleri derin bir sevgi ve dayanışma örneğidir.
explanation.id: Khadijah (R.A.) melamar beliau setelah menyaksikan kejujuran dan akhlaknya dalam bisnis dagang. Pernikahan mereka penuh cinta dan saling mendukung.
explanation.ms: Khadijah (R.A.) melamar Baginda selepas menyaksikan kejujuran dan akhlaknya dalam perniagaannya. Perkahwinan mereka penuh kasih dan sokongan.

question.en: How many children did the Prophet (SAW) have with Khadijah (R.A.)?
question.tr: Peygamber Efendimiz'in (SAV) Hz. Hatice'den (R.A.) kaç çocuğu oldu?
question.id: Berapa jumlah anak Nabi (SAW) dari Khadijah (R.A.)?
question.ms: Berapakah jumlah anak Nabi (SAW) daripada Khadijah (R.A.)?

explanation.en: His sons Qasim and Abdullah passed away in infancy. His daughters were Zaynab, Ruqayyah, Umm Kulthum, and Fatimah (R.A.).
explanation.tr: Oğulları Kasım ve Abdullah küçük yaşta vefat etti. Kızları Zeynep, Rukiyye, Ümmü Gülsüm ve Fatıma'dır (R.Anhünne).
explanation.id: Kedua putranya, Qasim dan Abdullah, wafat saat bayi. Keempat putrinya adalah Zainab, Ruqayyah, Ummu Kultsum, dan Fatimah (R.A.).
explanation.ms: Kedua-dua puteranya, Qasim dan Abdullah, wafat semasa bayi. Keempat-empat puterinya ialah Zainab, Ruqayyah, Ummu Kulthum, dan Fatimah (R.A.).

question.en: What is the name of the Prophet's (SAW) youngest daughter?
question.tr: Peygamber Efendimiz'in (SAV) en küçük kızının adı nedir?
question.id: Siapakah putri bungsu Nabi (SAW)?
question.ms: Siapakah puteri bongsu Nabi (SAW)?

explanation.en: Fatimah (R.A.) is called 'the leader of the women of Paradise'. She married Ali (R.A.) and their children are Hasan and Husayn (R.A.).
explanation.tr: Hz. Fatıma (R.A.) 'Cennet kadınlarının efendisi' olarak anılır. Hz. Ali ile evlenmiş; oğulları Hz. Hasan ve Hz. Hüseyin'dir (R.Anhüm).
explanation.id: Fatimah (R.A.) disebut 'pemimpin para wanita surga'. Ia menikah dengan Ali (R.A.) dan anaknya adalah Hasan dan Husain (R.A.).
explanation.ms: Fatimah (R.A.) digelar 'penghulu wanita ahli syurga'. Beliau berkahwin dengan Ali (R.A.) dan anak-anaknya ialah Hasan dan Husain (R.A.).

question.en: What was the name of the Prophet's (SAW) uncle who died at the Battle of Uhud?
question.tr: Uhud Savaşı'nda şehit olan Peygamberimizin (SAV) amcasının adı nedir?
question.id: Siapakah paman Nabi (SAW) yang syahid pada Perang Uhud?
question.ms: Siapakah bapa saudara Nabi (SAW) yang gugur syahid pada Perang Uhud?

explanation.en: Hamza (R.A.) is called 'the Lion of Allah' and 'Master of the Martyrs'. His martyrdom deeply grieved the Prophet (SAW).
explanation.tr: Hz. Hamza (R.A.); 'Esedullah' (Allah'ın Aslanı) ve 'Seyyidü'ş-Şühedâ' (Şehitlerin Efendisi) olarak anılır. Şehadeti Peygamber'i (SAV) derinden üzmüştür.
explanation.id: Hamzah (R.A.) dijuluki 'Singa Allah' dan 'Pemimpin Para Syuhada'. Syahidnya membuat Nabi (SAW) sangat berduka.
explanation.ms: Hamzah (R.A.) digelar 'Singa Allah' dan 'Penghulu Para Syuhada'. Syahidnya amat dukacita bagi Nabi (SAW).

question.en: What was the first mosque built in Islam?
question.tr: İslam tarihinde ilk inşa edilen mescit hangisidir?
question.id: Apa nama masjid pertama dalam Islam?
question.ms: Apakah masjid pertama dalam sejarah Islam?

explanation.en: The Prophet (SAW) built Masjid Quba on the outskirts of Medina upon his arrival during the Hijrah. Praying there is rewarded like performing an Umrah.
explanation.tr: Peygamberimiz (SAV) hicretle Medine'ye ulaştığında şehrin girişindeki Kuba'da bu mescidi inşa etti. Orada namaz kılmanın umre sevabı verdiği bildirilmiştir.
explanation.id: Nabi (SAW) membangun Masjid Quba di pinggiran Madinah saat tiba dalam Hijrah. Salat di sana pahalanya setara dengan umrah.
explanation.ms: Nabi (SAW) membina Masjid Quba di pinggir Madinah ketika tiba dalam Hijrah. Solat di sana dijanjikan pahala seumpama umrah.

question.en: Who gave the very first adhan in Islam?
question.tr: İslam'daki ilk ezanı okuyan kimdir?
question.id: Siapakah yang pertama kali mengumandangkan adzan dalam Islam?
question.ms: Siapakah yang pertama kali melaungkan azan dalam Islam?

explanation.en: Bilal (R.A.) was a formerly enslaved companion chosen by the Prophet (SAW) as the first muezzin, a status of immense honor.
explanation.tr: Hz. Bilal (R.A.) önceden köle olan bir sahabidir; Peygamberimiz (SAV) onu ilk müezzin olarak seçmiş, bu ona büyük bir şeref kazandırmıştır.
explanation.id: Bilal (R.A.) adalah sahabat yang dahulu berstatus budak, dipilih Nabi (SAW) sebagai muazin pertama — kedudukan yang sangat mulia.
explanation.ms: Bilal (R.A.) ialah sahabat yang dahulunya hamba, dipilih Nabi (SAW) sebagai muazin pertama — satu kedudukan yang amat mulia.

question.en: In what year did the Prophet (SAW) migrate to Medina (in CE)?
question.tr: Peygamber Efendimiz (SAV) Medine'ye hangi yılda hicret etti (miladi)?
question.id: Pada tahun berapa (Masehi) Nabi (SAW) hijrah ke Madinah?
question.ms: Pada tahun berapakah (Masihi) Nabi (SAW) berhijrah ke Madinah?

explanation.en: The Hijrah in 622 CE marks the beginning of the Islamic calendar. Umar (R.A.) later chose this event as year 1 of the Hijri calendar.
explanation.tr: 622 yılındaki hicret, Hicri takvimin başlangıcıdır. Hz. Ömer (R.A.) ileride bu olayı Hicri takvimin 1. yılı olarak belirlemiştir.
explanation.id: Hijrah pada 622 M menjadi awal kalender Islam. Umar (R.A.) kemudian menetapkan peristiwa ini sebagai tahun ke-1 kalender Hijriah.
explanation.ms: Hijrah pada 622 M menjadi permulaan kalendar Islam. Umar (R.A.) kemudian menetapkan peristiwa ini sebagai tahun ke-1 kalendar Hijrah.

question.en: What was Medina called before the Prophet's (SAW) arrival?
question.tr: Peygamberimiz (SAV) gelmeden önce Medine'nin adı neydi?
question.id: Apa nama Madinah sebelum kedatangan Nabi (SAW)?
question.ms: Apakah nama Madinah sebelum kedatangan Nabi (SAW)?

explanation.en: After the Prophet's arrival, it was renamed 'Madinat al-Nabi' (City of the Prophet), often shortened to Medina.
explanation.tr: Peygamberimizin (SAV) gelişinden sonra şehrin adı 'Medînetü'n-Nebî' (Peygamber'in Şehri) olarak değiştirilmiş, kısaca Medine diye anılmıştır.
explanation.id: Setelah kedatangan Nabi (SAW), namanya diubah menjadi 'Madinah an-Nabi' (Kota Nabi), yang kemudian lazim disebut Madinah.
explanation.ms: Selepas kedatangan Nabi (SAW), namanya ditukar kepada 'Madinat an-Nabi' (Kota Nabi), yang kemudiannya lazim disebut Madinah.

question.en: What was the first major battle in Islam?
question.tr: İslam tarihinin ilk büyük muharebesi hangisidir?
question.id: Apa nama pertempuran besar pertama dalam Islam?
question.ms: Apakah peperangan besar pertama dalam Islam?

explanation.en: The Battle of Badr in 2 AH was a decisive victory for the small Muslim army against the much larger Quraysh force. The Quran calls it the 'Day of Criterion'.
explanation.tr: Hicri 2'de gerçekleşen Bedir, sayıca az Müslüman ordunun çok daha büyük Kureyş ordusuna karşı kazandığı kesin bir zaferdir. Kuran bunu 'Furkân Günü' olarak anar.
explanation.id: Perang Badar pada 2 H adalah kemenangan menentukan bagi pasukan Muslim yang kecil melawan pasukan Quraisy yang jauh lebih besar. Al-Quran menyebutnya 'Hari Furqan'.
explanation.ms: Perang Badar pada 2 H adalah kemenangan menentukan bagi tentera Muslim yang kecil melawan tentera Quraisy yang lebih besar. Al-Quran menyebutnya 'Hari Furqan'.

question.en: How many Muslims fought at the Battle of Badr?
question.tr: Bedir Savaşı'nda Müslümanlar kaç kişiydi?
question.id: Berapa jumlah pasukan Muslim dalam Perang Badar?
question.ms: Berapakah jumlah tentera Muslim dalam Perang Badar?

explanation.en: 313 Muslims faced around 1,000 Quraysh soldiers. Allah sent angels to aid the believers, turning a seemingly impossible battle into a triumph.
explanation.tr: 313 Müslüman, yaklaşık 1000 kişilik Kureyş ordusuyla karşı karşıya geldi. Allah meleklerini göndererek imkânsız görünen bir savaşı zafere dönüştürdü.
explanation.id: 313 Muslim menghadapi sekitar 1.000 tentara Quraisy. Allah menurunkan malaikat untuk membantu orang beriman, mengubah pertempuran yang mustahil menjadi kemenangan.
explanation.ms: 313 umat Islam berhadapan dengan kira-kira 1,000 tentera Quraisy. Allah menurunkan malaikat untuk membantu mereka, menjadikan pertempuran yang kelihatan mustahil sebagai kemenangan.

question.en: In which year (AH) was the Battle of Uhud?
question.tr: Uhud Savaşı hangi hicri yılda gerçekleşmiştir?
question.id: Pada tahun Hijriah berapa Perang Uhud terjadi?
question.ms: Pada tahun Hijrah manakah Perang Uhud berlaku?

explanation.en: Uhud, fought in 3 AH, was a difficult battle where the Muslims suffered losses due to the archers leaving their post. It taught vital lessons about obedience.
explanation.tr: Hicri 3'te yapılan Uhud, okçuların görev yerini terk etmesi sebebiyle kayıplar verildiği zor bir savaştır. İtaat konusunda büyük dersler barındırır.
explanation.id: Uhud, pada 3 H, adalah pertempuran berat di mana kaum Muslimin menderita kerugian karena pemanah meninggalkan posnya. Perang ini memberi pelajaran penting tentang ketaatan.
explanation.ms: Uhud, pada 3 H, adalah peperangan yang sukar di mana umat Islam mengalami kerugian kerana pemanah meninggalkan posnya. Ia mengajarkan pelajaran penting tentang ketaatan.

question.en: What is the Battle of the Trench also known as?
question.tr: Hendek Savaşı'nın diğer adı nedir?
question.id: Perang Khandaq dikenal juga sebagai?
question.ms: Perang Khandaq dikenali juga sebagai?

explanation.en: In 5 AH, the Quraysh and their allies besieged Medina. Salman al-Farisi (R.A.) suggested digging a trench, which protected the city and led to the confederates' retreat.
explanation.tr: Hicri 5'te Kureyş ve müttefikleri Medine'yi kuşattı. Selmân-ı Fârisî'nin (R.A.) teklifiyle kazılan hendek şehri korudu ve ittifak kuvvetleri geri çekilmek zorunda kaldı.
explanation.id: Pada 5 H, Quraisy dan sekutunya mengepung Madinah. Salman al-Farisi (R.A.) mengusulkan menggali parit, yang melindungi kota dan memaksa koalisi mundur.
explanation.ms: Pada 5 H, Quraisy dan sekutu mereka mengepung Madinah. Salman al-Farisi (R.A.) mencadangkan menggali parit, yang melindungi kota dan memaksa pakatan itu berundur.

question.en: In what year (CE) was Mecca conquered by the Muslims?
question.tr: Mekke miladi hangi yıl Müslümanlar tarafından fethedildi?
question.id: Pada tahun Masehi berapa Mekah ditaklukkan oleh kaum Muslimin?
question.ms: Pada tahun Masihi manakah Mekah dibuka oleh umat Islam?

explanation.en: The conquest was largely peaceful. The Prophet (SAW) entered Mecca with humility and forgave most of his former enemies, declaring 'no blame upon you today.'
explanation.tr: Fetih büyük ölçüde barışçıl olmuştur. Peygamberimiz (SAV) Mekke'ye tevazu ile girmiş ve 'Bugün size kınama yoktur' diyerek eski düşmanlarının çoğunu affetmiştir.
explanation.id: Penaklukan berjalan sebagian besar damai. Nabi (SAW) masuk Mekah dengan rendah hati dan memaafkan sebagian besar mantan musuhnya, bersabda 'Tiada celaan atas kalian hari ini.'
explanation.ms: Pembukaan itu sebahagian besarnya aman. Nabi (SAW) memasuki Mekah dengan tawaduk dan memaafkan sebahagian besar musuh lamanya, bersabda 'Tiada celaan ke atas kamu pada hari ini.'

question.en: At what age did the Prophet (SAW) pass away?
question.tr: Peygamber Efendimiz (SAV) kaç yaşında vefat etmiştir?
question.id: Pada usia berapa Nabi (SAW) wafat?
question.ms: Pada usia berapa Nabi (SAW) wafat?

explanation.en: The Prophet (SAW) passed in 11 AH (632 CE) in Medina after a brief illness, having completed the message of Islam in his farewell sermon.
explanation.tr: Peygamber Efendimiz (SAV) Hicri 11 (miladi 632)'de kısa bir hastalığın ardından Medine'de vefat etmiştir. Veda Hutbesi'nde İslam'ın tebliğini tamamlamıştı.
explanation.id: Nabi (SAW) wafat pada 11 H (632 M) di Madinah setelah sakit singkat, setelah menyempurnakan risalah Islam dalam khutbah Wada'.
explanation.ms: Nabi (SAW) wafat pada 11 H (632 M) di Madinah selepas sakit singkat, setelah menyempurnakan risalah Islam dalam khutbah Wada'.
